findings.description: Repeating page header text from the PDF is incorrectly inserted as a data cell within the HTML table.
findings.evidence: The document header text from the top of PDF Page 2 ('G.S. 108A-88...', 'County Budget Estimates...', etc., ending with 'Page 2 of 3') is embedded inside the first column of the continuous HTML table. It appears as a large, multi-line cell between the data row for '23 Food and Nutrition Benefits' and the 'Wilkes County' sub-header row.

findings.description: Repeating page header text from the PDF is incorrectly inserted as a data cell within the HTML table.
findings.evidence: Similar to page 2, the document header text from the top of PDF Page 3 is embedded inside the first column of the HTML table. It appears as a large cell between the data row for '40 State CPS Caseload Reduction' and the 'Wilkes County' sub-header row.
